pets.name: Alien
pets.description: Cute, cuddly, and we're almost positive it doesn't want to take over the planet.

pets.name: Bald Eagle
pets.description: Nothing says freedom like a pet Eagle!

pets.name: Cerberus
pets.description: Three times the heads means three times the cute! Also, bonus barking.

pets.name: Corgi
pets.description: A breed specially designed for office shenanigans.

pets.name: Dapper Duck
pets.description: Farnsworth P. Duckington comes from an established line of aristocratic water fowl. Tally ho!

pets.name: Dire Wolf Brown
pets.description: The brown dire wolf craves prey found amidst the forest.

pets.name: Dire Wolf Grey
pets.description: Especially adapted for flat ground, the grey wolf is master of the plains.

pets.name: Dire Wolf White
pets.description: Built for snow and ice, the white Dire Wolf thrives in cold climates.

pets.name: Dragon Pet
pets.description: Symbolizes power, luck, and looking snazzy in green.

pets.name: Flying Pig
pets.description: A rare breed of pig often found giving rides to zombies. Play Zombie Farm Escape to see it in action.

pets.name: Ghost
pets.description: Theres no telling what sort of creature this was when it was living. It sure is friendly though.

pets.name: Gingerbread Man
pets.description: Run, run as fast as you can. You'll never lose me, I'm your pet Gingerbread Man.

pets.name: Happy Dragon
pets.description: He floats upon tiny wings and pure happiness.

pets.name: Mau
pets.description: Pet cat of Zombses II

pets.name: Monkey
pets.description: This monkey is as curious as ever!

pets.name: Morp
pets.description: A hungry, curious Morp from Eat Eat Hooray!

pets.name: Mr. Wiggles
pets.description: A streetwise worm from the big city. Play Zombie Life today!

pets.name: Otter
pets.description: Your one and only significant Otter. You two will be Otterly inseparable!

pets.name: Penguin Pet
pets.description: What's more adorable than a waddling penguin? Absolutely nothing.

pets.name: Persian Cat
pets.description: A fancy, fluffy cat that excels at shedding all over nice clothes.

pets.name: Pink Bunny
pets.description: A cute bunny, your friend forever.

pets.name: Polar Bear Pet
pets.description: Even its sharp, pointy teeth are cute and cuddly.

pets.name: Pony Pet
pets.description: A pleasantly pretty, pink, and prancing pony to perfect your farm!

pets.name: Poppy
pets.description: The benevolent forest fairy from Tree World is visiting your farm!

pets.name: Possum
pets.description: This possum likes to play dead, hoping it will blend in with your zombies.

pets.name: Pterodactyl
pets.description: Flapping its way into your heart.

pets.name: Seal Pup
pets.description: Seal pups are made of 10% flippers, 30% blubber, and 600% love.

pets.name: Spring Chick Pet
pets.description: This little chick is almost ready to take on the world, starting with your farm!

pets.name: Turkey Pet
pets.description: A fashionable fowl that answers to Fred.

pets.name: White Bunny
pets.description: A cute bunny, your friend forever.

pets.name: T-Rex
pets.description: With teeny-tiny flailing arms and a giant head filled with teeth, it can only be a T-Rex.

pets.name: Pet Brain
pets.description: An exclusive Pet Brain for the low price of 1,000 brains! It seems to like you!

pets.name: Tame Bull Frog
pets.description: A tame bull frog that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Foul Owl
pets.description: A tame foul owl that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Groundhog
pets.description: A tame groundhog that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Larva
pets.description: A tame larva that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Locust
pets.description: A tame locust that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Mamba
pets.description: A tame mamba that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Rhino
pets.description: A tame rhino that was once evil.

pets.name: Tame Skunk
pets.description: A tame skunk that was once evil.
